apps.name: LocalLens Translate
apps.subtitle: Local translation app with OCR and Share Extension
apps.localizedDescription: LocalLens Translate is an iOS translation app scaffold that uses local OCR and a replaceable on-device translation engine. This IPA is intended for SideStore or AltStore sideloading, where the app is signed locally with your Apple ID.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LocalLens reads images you choose so it can extract and translate text on this device.
